texts.item.back.label: Back
texts.dialog.overwrite.title: Overwrite save?
texts.dialog.overwrite.header: Are you sure you want to overwrite slot %d?
texts.dialog.overwrite.content: The existing save will be replaced and cannot be recovered.
texts.dialog.name.title: Name your save
texts.dialog.name.content: Enter a name for this save (or accept the default).
texts.dialog.delete.title: Delete save?
texts.dialog.delete.header: Are you sure you want to delete slot %d?
texts.dialog.delete.content: The save will be removed from disk and cannot be recovered.
texts.dialog.delete-error.title: Delete failed
texts.dialog.save-error.title: Save failed
